prompt: A cinematic fashion photograph of a young woman standing on a wet dark rock ledge in front of a towering waterfall inside a rocky gorge. Full-body shot, wide horizontal composition, subject placed slightly right of center, with the waterfall occupying most of the left and center background as a huge curtain of white rushing water and mist. The scene feels moody, elegant, and realistic, with natural overcast lighting, cool gray tones in the environment, and subtle contrast against the warm skin tones. She has a slim athletic figure, long legs, and dark hair tied in a high messy ponytail. Her face is turned slightly to the side for a composed editorial pose. She wears a dark brown asymmetrical one-shoulder ruched crop top, a beige high-waisted wrap mini skirt with a thin belt and short built-in shorts, and strappy high-heel sandals. Her skin and outfit are slightly wet from the spray. Pose with one leg extended forward, hips angled, one arm relaxed by her side, the other resting naturally, creating a confident luxury fashion-editorial silhouette. Background details include 1 large waterfall, 1 slick black rock wall on the right, and 1 wet reflective stone platform underfoot. Ultra-realistic photography, high detail, shallow depth of field but with the waterfall still recognizable, soft mist, water droplets, dramatic natural texture, premium magazine shoot aesthetic, muted earthy palette, no text, no extra people, no props.
